mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('SQ_REQUEST_KEY')
INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, CHG_MOBILE_NO, MEMO, REG_DATE, REG_DT, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, PROC_CD, REC_YN, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{custType}, #{managerCd}, #{agentCd}, #{ctn}, #{memo}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), NOW(), NOW(), #{name}, 'RQ', 'N', 'N', 'N' )

SELECT nextval('SQ_REQUEST_SVC_CHG_DTL_SEQ')
INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG_DTL ( REQUEST_SVC_CHG_DTL_SEQ, REQUEST_KEY, SVC_TGT_CD, SVC_CHG_TYPE_CD, PROC_TYPE_CD, PROD_ID, PROD_NM, ADDTION_INFO, REQ_USIM_SN, CHG_MOBILE_NO, RELEASE_PWD, CRET_DT, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN ) VALUES ( #{dtlSeq}, #{requestKey}, #{svcTgtCd}, #{svcChgTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{procTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{prodId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addtionInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqUsimSn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chgMobileNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releasePwd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), 'N', 'N' )
